Business Name: Stony Ridge Travel Center / Stony Ridge Truck Plaza
Description: Independent travel center / truck plaza at I-75 Exit 29 (OH-63), Monroe, historically ~300 truck spaces ($10 fee), 24/7 store.
Love's Travel Stop at I-75 Exit 167 in North Baltimore. 24-hour travel center with Arby's, CAT scale, tire/truck repair bays, laundry, and showers.
Large Petro/TravelCenters of America stopping center at I-75 Exit 167 in North Baltimore. 24-hour Iron Skillet restaurant, TA Truck Service repair bays, CAT scale, laundry, barber, and showers.
Small 24-hour Mobil-branded travel center at I-75 Exit 198 (Wales Rd/Oregon Rd) in Northwood. Convenience store, deli, fast food; limited facilities.

Business Name: US Fuel Mart / Interstate Truck Stop
Description: Small Fuel Mart fuel/truck stop at I-75 Exit 168 near Portage/Bowling Green. ATM and fleet-card fuel; directory notes no truck parking available.
Small convenience mart / fuel stop at I-75 Exit 195 (Crossroads Pkwy) in Rossford, near the I-75/I-475/Ohio Turnpike junction area. Deli and limited truck parking.

Love's Travel Stop #747 at I-75 Exit 90 (Fair Rd) in Sidney; opened December 2018. Offers 24-hour diesel, CAT Scale, 130 truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, on-site Speedco tire/lube, RV hookups, truck wash, and Hardee's, Godfather's Pizza and Chester's Chicken.
Pilot Travel Center at I-75 Exit 210 in north Toledo, near the Michigan line. Subway, diesel, showers, and a CAT scale.
Speedway fuel location at I-75 Exit 73 (OH-55) in Troy with a 24/7 store and diesel lanes; primarily a fuel/diesel stop.
Flying J Travel Center (Pilot Flying J store #97) at I-75 Exit 64 in Vandalia, north of Dayton. Offers 24-hour diesel, CAT Scale, showers, laundry, drivers lounge and on-site Subway and Cinnabon.

TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-75 Exit 111 (I-75 & US-33); sources report ~145 truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, Country Pride restaurant, truck repair/tire service, and scales. Operated by L & G Truckers City, Inc. (DBA TA Wapak).

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Beaverdam
Description: Blue Beacon truck/trailer wash at I-75 Exit 135 (near the Pilot/Flying J), open 24 hours with three wash bays; offers exterior wash, trailer washouts, undercarriage rinse, and polishing services.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of North Baltimore
Description: Blue Beacon Truck Wash at I-75 Exit 167 (North Baltimore), located at the Petro Travel Plaza; open 24/7.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Perrysburg
Description: Blue Beacon Truck Wash near the Stony Ridge Flying J, listed at I-280 Exit 1B (Perrysburg/Stony Ridge).
"Superior Wash" semi truck washing at 11155 Mosteller Rd, Sharonville (near I-75 Exit 15).
Drive-thru semi truck wash bay on Mosteller Road in Sharonville, just off I-75 Exit 15. Part of a TNT Services truck dealership/maintenance/detail complex.
Truck wash at Love's Travel Stop #747, I-75 Exit 90, Sidney. Offers tractor/trailer wash, trailer wash-out, sweep-out and sanitize, box truck and RV/motorhome packages.
Truck/tank wash near I-75 Exit 207 (Matzinger Rd) in Toledo. Interior tank cleaning and exterior truck washing.

Business Name: Ohio Weigh Station - I-75 Southbound (Hancock County)
Description: Fixed Ohio weigh/inspection station on I-75 southbound in Hancock County near Findlay (north of US-224, approx. mile marker 162); accepts PrePass. Operated under Ohio State Highway Patrol (ODOT does not staff weigh stations).

Business Name: Ohio Weigh Station - I-75 Northbound (Wood County)
Description: Fixed Ohio weigh/inspection station on I-75 northbound in Wood County, located south of the Petro at Exit 167 (North Baltimore). Operated under Ohio State Highway Patrol.
